name: glassworks
summary: A glassblower's studio with a roaring glory hole furnace, a marver slab, gaffer's bench with tools, and annealing oven. Molten color and sand.

size_guidance.aspect_ratio: squareish with furnace dominating one side

accent.purpose: scorched zone around furnace and marver

primary_palette.note: classic studio — one furnace, one working station
full production — cool-down oven alongside main furnace

story_prompts: mid-blow — gaffer turning a red-hot gather, apprentice ready with jacks
commissioned window — colored rods stacked, design pinned to the wall
explosion aftermath — a vessel shattered mid-cool, scorched bench
night shift — furnace banked low, watcher feeding coals

lighting_notes.ambient_intent: hot orange glow from furnace dominates (0.35 ambient + furnace light)

anti_patterns: furnace on an exterior wall with implied chimney — never centerfloor
gaffer's bench in front of the furnace so the blowpipe has room
annealing oven far from furnace to avoid shock — not adjacent
